DP.252.0000:
I’m Mira...\f
I was catching Pokémon, and then
I got lost...\f
I’m so scared...\f
Please!
Please take me to the exit!\f
DP.252.0002:
Mira: I’ll keep your Pokémon healthy
all the time!
DP.252.0003:
Trainer, your name is [0103,0000]?\f
My name is Mira.
I like your name!\f
DP.252.0004:
Mira: Oh! [0103,0000]...
I waited... A long time...\f
DP.252.0005:
Mira: Oh! There’s the exit!\f
I want to get tougher so I
won’t be such a scaredy-cat.\f
[0103,0000], bye-bye!
Thank you!\f
DP.252.0009:
Mira: I like helpful Pokémon moves
like Growl and Minimize.\f
Those kinds of moves are my
favorites.
DP.252.0010:
Mira: This cave...
It’s so easy to get confused.\f
Do you know where we are?
DP.252.0011:
Mira: [0103,0000], did you get to be
so good because you’re always with\r
your Pokémon?\f
Yes! That has to be it!
Mira will try like you!
